name: workflow
description: | Use when a task is too large for turn-by-turn orchestration and should run through the big-task workflow lane: system-wide changes, large migrations, repo-wide audits, high-confidence verification, or tasks explicitly asking to run a workflow. Claude Code uses native dynamic workflows; Codex and OpenCode use the portable workflow adapter. Trigger with /hyperflow:workflow, "run a workflow", "dynamic workflow", "big task", "large migration", "repo-wide audit".
author: jeremylongshore
summary_zh: 把超大任务交给一条专用流水线来跑，适合系统级改造、大规模迁移、全仓审计或需要高置信验证的场景，省去你手把手分步指挥的麻烦。
